Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.reason: MYB27 is a direct target of AN1, activated by MBW complexes, and its transcript levels respond to high light and development.

Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.reason: Promoter assays and transgenic data support MYB27 as an MBW-induced feedback repressor that represses its own promoter.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: All listed methods were used on MYB27 in Results/Methods.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: This accurately summarizes the Results and Discussion for MYB27.

Other_Important_Info.reason: Cell autonomy, transient GFP-MYB27 signal implying instability, and unchanged flavonols in sepals are all described.
